arts.ttl: Wolves transfer news: Spurs-linked Real Betis star viewed as January target?
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers are allegedly interested in securing a deal for Real Betis midfielder Johnny Cardoso, a player known to be admired by Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Assane Diao: ‘With Fabregas Everything Is Possible at Como’
arts.sum: Assane Diao, Como's new Spanish attacker, has made an immediate impact in Serie A, scoring two goals in his first 250 minutes of play and becoming the youngest player with at least two goals in the league.
